title: Close the protocol proof with a validation-gated dogfood run
body: Build the smallest end-to-end protocol-proof harness that consumes this Story, invokes the Architect Role with bounded context, emits one ArchitectureImpact, validates it through daimyo's Validation built-in, and records evidence for the proof's own next step.
acceptance_criteria: The harness wires Story -> RoleInvocation -> ArchitectRoleRunner -> RoleResult plus ArchitectureImpact -> ValidationReport.
The ValidationReport status is machine-readable pass/fail and is not a prose-only verdict.
The ArchitectureImpact identifies the proof harness, validation gate, dogfood evidence, and proof writeup surfaces.
The live dogfood run is opt-in and captured as committed evidence.

bounded_context.task: DGOS-T-0023 End-to-End Proof Harness, Validation Gate & Dogfood Run
bounded_context.approved_flow: Story -> RoleInvocation -> ArchitectRoleRunner -> RoleResult + ArchitectureImpact -> daimyo BuiltInValidation -> ValidationReport
